title: Google BeyondCorp App Connection
description: Schema for a BeyondCorp app connection resource that defines a secure connection to a private application endpoint through BeyondCorp.

name.description: The resource name of the app connection

displayName.description: User-friendly display name for the app connection

uid.description: Unique identifier of the app connection

type.description: The type of network connectivity used by the connection

applicationEndpoint.description: The endpoint of the application to connect to

connectors.description: Resource names of app connectors associated with this connection

state.description: Current state of the app connection

labels.description: Labels applied to the app connection

createTime.description: Timestamp when the connection was created

updateTime.description: Timestamp when the connection was last updated

ApplicationEndpoint.description: The endpoint of the application to connect to

host.description: Hostname or IP address of the application

Gateway.description: Gateway configuration for the app connection

type.description: The type of gateway hosting the connection

ingressPort.description: The ingress port of the gateway
